Thank you, David. Let me introduce myself. I am a nurse, and my expertise is robotic surgery.

Hello Andreia, this is David Lewis. Next week we open the international training program, and I would like you to give a short self-presentation to the visiting mentors. You have about three minutes, so plan it well. Please tell them who you are and what you do today. Then go back in time and explain how your career started, and what you have accomplished so far in robotic surgery. After that, describe what you are working on right now, during this transition. And finally, share where you want to go next, your main aspiration for the program. Use all the tenses we have studied, from the present simple to the future. Give a clear overview, highlight your strengths, and summarize at the end. This is a great chance to present your professional identity with confidence. Thank you, Andreia, and good luck.

Good morning, everyone. Let me introduce myself. My name is Andreia, and I am a nurse at Hospital Israelita Albert Einstein, in São Paulo. My role today is in robotic surgery, and my expertise is the da Vinci system. Let me give you a quick overview of my career path. I started as an intern in the intensive care unit many years ago, and then I moved into the operating room. Since then, I have worked on hundreds of procedures, and I have trained six new nurses on the robotic arms. Right now, I am leading a small team, and I am studying for a new certification. I want to highlight one strength: I stay calm under pressure. Looking ahead, my main aspiration is to lead the whole training program next year. So, to summarize, I am an experienced nurse, I have grown a lot, and I am ready for the next step. Thank you very much for your time.

Let me describe how Andreia organized her self-presentation. First, she introduced herself and explained her role today. Then she went back and told the story of how her career started. Next, she highlighted what she has accomplished so far. After that, she described what she is working on right now. Finally, she shared her aspiration for the future and summarized her professional identity.
